PepeSwap
Decentralized Exchange

PepeSwap, the next evolution in DeFi platforms. PepeSwap gives users the ability to provide liquidity, stake, and SWAP tokens to gain PEPE returns through our sophisticated and innovative passive income reward system.

How to claim $PEPE

1. Connect a Wallet

Please connect the wallet to receive PEPE tokens.

2. Check Eligibility

We verify whether your wallet is eligible to receive PEPE tokens. This process runs automatically.

3. Confirm the ownership of your wallet.

To confirm that you are indeed the owner of the wallet, please sign the message generated by the wallet.

4. Claim $PEPE

Please sign the transaction in your wallet to claim $PEPE.
